skip_reason: Requires locating a Bitmoji 3D avatar image URL matching a specific cf-st.sc-cdn.net or images.bitmoji.com pattern in window.__NEXT_DATA__, page elements, or inline scripts. Whether this data is present on a public Snap profile page varies and isn't reliably reproducible in CI; if no match is found the bookmarklet falls back to prompt(), which is auto-dismissed in headless mode. The overlay also fetches and image-hashes dozens of historical avatar versions (network-heavy, slow, and dependent on third-party CDN availability), which is unsuitable for a CI health check.
notes: Active - extracts the Bitmoji 3D avatar URL (template/user ID/version) from the Snapchat profile page, then fetches and perceptually hashes up to ~500 historical avatar image versions to group them into 'outfits', displaying them in a full-screen overlay titled 'Snapchat Bitmoji Historical Avatar Viewer'. If no Bitmoji URL is found it falls back to prompt(), which in headless CI returns null and the script exits early without error.
